legal_model.notes_normalized: Cannabis is illegal in Latvia / Latvija. Medical cannabis is illegal. Distribution is illegal. Prison exposure detected.

notes_normalized: Cannabis is illegal in Latvia / Latvija. Medical cannabis is illegal. Distribution is illegal. Prison exposure detected.
notes_raw: {{main|Cannabis in Latvia}} Possession of up to {{cvt|1|g|frac=28}} can result in a €280 fine; for second offenses within a year period, criminal charges are applied. Larger quantities can be punished with up to 15 years in prison.

facts.penalty: fine; for second offenses within a year period, criminal charges are applied.
